tools.name: export_json_ld
tools.description:
Export project data in JSON-LD format using a configured export profile.

Use `fetch_json_ld_import_profiles` first to discover the configTypeId. At least one of exportTypes/exportElements/exportTaxonomies/exportDataTypes must be true. Tree-based mode (graphBased=false) requires exactly one nodeId

tools.name: fetch_json_ld_import_profiles
tools.description: Fetch JSON-LD import/export profiles available for a project.

tools.name: export_jsonschema
tools.description: Export project data as a JSON Schema string.

tools.name: fetch_json_schema_import_profiles
tools.description: Fetch JSON Schema import/export profiles available for a project.

tools.name: import_jsonschema
tools.description: Imports a JSON Schema into a space

tools.name: validate_json
tools.description:
Validate a JSON document against a project's stored JSON Schema.

The schema is regenerated from the project using the supplied configTypeId (the export profile id) and rootNodeId. Provide the JSON to validate as a serialized string.

tools.name: bulk_create
tools.description:
Create multiple nodes, relations, and mixin values in one atomic operation.

When to use:
- Creating more than one node.
- Any creation that includes relations and/or mixins.
- For a single node with no relations/mixins, prefer create_node.

Required ids come from:
- get_mixins_and_relation_

tools.name: create_mixin_type
tools.description: Create a new mixin type. Check existing mixins first with get_mixins_and_relation_groups to avoid duplicates. Mixins are reusable property sets applicable to any node.

tools.name: generate_project_ai_summary
tools.description: Generate an AI summary of the project (from its types, elements and taxonomies) and save it as the project's markdown AI summary. Returns the generated summary. If a summary already exists it is returned unchanged unless regenerateIfStale=true (default) and the project has been updated since the sum

tools.name: get_mixins_and_relation_groups
tools.description:
Get the project schema: all mixin definitions and all relation-group definitions.

Use this once at the start of a session to discover the IDs needed by other tools (mixinId, columnId, relationGroupId). Returns compact positional arrays - see the "format" field for the layout.

tools.name: get_project_summary
tools.description:
Labels and IDs of types, elements, and taxonomies in the project. Each category is paginated independently.

Pagination:
- First call: omit page (defaults to 0).
- Each category reports page, pageSize and hasMore. Re-request with page+1 for any category whose hasMore is true.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List the user's CoreModels projects as [id,name,accessLevel] (see the response "format" field). Use a returned id as graphProjectId for other tools. Pass searchTerm to filter by name (case-insensitive substring). Set includePublicProjects=true to also include public projects. Set includeAISummary=tr

tools.name: create_mixin_value
tools.description: Create a mixin value for a node. mixinId and column ids come from get_mixins_and_relation_groups. A node can have multiple mixins; each mixin can have multiple columns.

tools.name: remove_mixin_value
tools.description: Remove one or more mixin column values from a node. mixinId and column ids come from get_mixins_and_relation_groups. This does not delete the mixin definition itself.

tools.name: create_node
tools.description: Create a new node. Empty/omitted spaceIds = default space; MUST be empty when nodeType is 'Space'.

tools.name: update_node
tools.description: Update an existing node's label and/or its space assignments. Omitted fields are unchanged. spaceIds replaces (not merges) existing assignments; empty array = default space. At least one of label or spaceIds must be provided.

tools.name: remove_node
tools.description: Suspend a node.

tools.name: create_relation
tools.description: Create a directed relation fromNodeId → toNodeId. relationGroupId is the relation template; list templates with get_mixins_and_relation_groups.

tools.name: remove_relation
tools.description: Remove a relation between two nodes.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description:
Search nodes in a CoreModels project. Returns compact positional arrays; the response "format" field describes the layout.

Filters (provide at least one; they combine with AND):
- nodeIds: exact id lookup
- nodeType: one of Element, Type, Taxonomy, Exemplar, Component, Space, Tag, Mixin
- expr

tools.name: export_shex
tools.description: Export project data as a ShEx (Shape Expressions) schema string.

tools.name: run_code
tools.description:
Execute a JavaScript program that orchestrates this server's tools, and return only its result.

Prefer this over many individual tool calls when a task needs several steps, looping, filtering, or
combining data: intermediate results stay in the sandbox, so only what you return reaches the model.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "run_code" is 960 chars, far longer than this server's median (168). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Execute a JavaScript program that orchestrates this server's tools, and return only its result. Prefer this over many individual tool calls when a task needs se…

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "run_code" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.
